reasoning: The only upcoming fast marathon before December 31, 2025 is Valencia (in December). With the major fall marathons (Berlin, Chicago, New York) already concluded by early November 2025, the opportunities are extremely limited. Furthermore, breaking 2 hours requires dropping at least 35 seconds from Kelvin Kiptum's world record (2:00:35). Tragically, Kiptum passed away in early 2024, and no other active athlete has proven capable of running near the 2-hour mark legally (Eliud Kipchoge is past his prime, and no one else has run sub-2:01). The odds of a legal sub-2-hour performance before the end of 2025 are exceptionally small.
